title: arenaria formosa var. glabra
intro: Arenaria formosa var. glabra, also known as glabrous beautyberry, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arenaria formosa var. glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to create salves and creams for topical application.
